data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Interface elements that are easier to select improve usability.
data.technical_spec: Optimization of clickable areas for essential interactive elements.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Shorten user decision time by simplifying menu options and layouts.
data.technical_spec: Simplified navigation menus and personalized suggestions.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Limiting the amount of information displayed to prevent cognitive overload.
data.technical_spec: Chunking content into digestible sections, like video playlists.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Users prefer interfaces that work similarly to other commonly used systems.
data.technical_spec: Aligning user interface patterns with widely adopted web standards.

data.title: Tesler’s Law
data.description: Complexity is kept within the system rather than being passed to the user.
data.technical_spec: Advanced algorithms for seamless video recommendations without user input.
